candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total line.
Also a valid revenue line, but appears to duplicate Revenue exactly and is less preferred because it is a total.

variables.notes: Using Revenue as primary and Total Revenue as fallback priority label because both appear as revenue labels across years; later code should take first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs on the income statement.
Inventory balance sheet item, not an expense; not suitable for COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the income statement expense row as COGS.

candidates.why: Clear overhead/personnel cost component; appropriate SG&A component.
Generic operating overhead bucket; appropriate SG&A component absent an explicit SG&A line.
More consistent with direct production/service costs and selected as COGS, so excluded from SG&A.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

variables.notes: CR:nc|high. No explicit SG&A subtotal is present. Selected overhead components and excluded COGS, depreciation/amortization, impairments, and totals.
No dedicated research and development expense line appears on the provided income statement.

candidates.why: Most granular recurring interest expense line; preferred for XINT.
Recurring financing cost component; include alongside other interest expense to improve coverage.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Also an interest line, but marked supplemental and appears duplicative of lease interest line.
Broader total likely includes FX and other non-interest items, so less preferred than granular interest components.
Balancing row, should not be selected.

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring interest rows over total Financial expenses, which appears to include exchange rate losses and other non-interest items.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent company
candidates.why: Best owner-only equity line; preferred because it excludes non-controlling interests.
Valid equity line but less preferred than owner-attributable equity because BE should exclude minority interests.
Balancing row, not appropriate for book equity.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not appropriate for book equity.
Total balance sheet equation line, not equity alone.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent company

variables.notes: Selected owner-attributable equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement performance line, not a balance sheet minority interest/equity line.

variables.notes: No non-controlling interests/minority interest line appears on the provided balance sheet; treating MIB as absent.
